tw.description:
家計帳薄很複雜。但我們將複雜性降低至最小，使其簡單便利。 
家計帳薄使用十分簡單。在基本畫面上就可以使用各種功能， 
通過設定，還可以隨意調整詳細的功能。 

- 您可以隨時隨地輕鬆輸入。 
- 可通過圖表一目了然地確認資產的支出狀況。 
- 僅通過簡單的輸入就可以瀏覽各種統計。 
- 提供檢索功能。 
- 提供計算機功能。 
- 根據需要，可以分成小分類和大分類來使用。 
- 可以一次性地進行資產管理。 
- 可以同時使用各種貨幣。 
- 可以確認以週，月和年為單位的統計。 
- 提供日曆功能。 
－提供預算設定功能，可以設定以週，月和年為單位的預算。 
－可以設定資產的目標。 
－可以變更月份開始日期。 

※ 電腦記賬本 
用戶可以使用無線網或移動網在電腦輕松編輯、分類和搜索保存在iPhone的記賬本。 用戶不僅可以按時間進行搜索，還可以按資産進行大小分類查詢結果。 

※ 采用複式記賬概念 
好用記賬本不僅僅是記錄單純收支的記賬本，而是在輸入每筆收支時同步反映到賬戶上，從而可以有效進行理財。 

※ 信用卡/借記卡管理 
輸入結算日時可以在資産欄實時確認待還款額和未結金額。使用借記卡時如果互聯借記卡的短信和賬戶，即可從賬戶扣除相應金額，因此管理更輕松。 

※ 轉賬和自動轉賬、重複設置 
爲進行高效的理財，提供資産之間互相轉賬功能。利用自動轉賬及重複設置功能，用戶可以更方便地管理工資、保險金、儲蓄、貸款等。 

※ 更直觀的統計功能 
以輸入數據爲基礎，可以按分類確認支出和每月趨勢。同時還可以查詢各資産的變動趨勢和收支分析圖。

Subscription pricing and terms:

Money Manager offers auto-renewing monthly subscription at US$2.49/month and an auto-renewing yearly subscription at US$19.99/year to provide you with unlimited access to the Money Manager Data Sync Service while you maintain an active subscription.

Payment will be charged to the credit card connected to your iTunes Account when you confirm the initial subscription purchase.
Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current subscription period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and the cost of the renewal will be identified. 
You may manage your subscription and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to your Account Settings after the purchase.

tw.description:
Incredibox 能讓你在一群快樂的節奏口技達人幫助下創作自己的音樂。選擇你的音樂風格，開始錄製、錄音並分享你的混音曲。透過嘻哈節拍、電子波、流行人聲、爵士搖擺、巴西節奏等等聲音，讓你沉醉在音樂的律動之中。此外，還可以探索社群創建的各種模組，其內容素材豐富，能讓你混音上數小時，而且無廣告或應用程式內購。

Incredibox 是遊戲，也是工具，更重要的是一種視聽體驗，所帶來的樂趣很快就成為各年齡層的熱門選擇。音樂、圖形、動畫與互動性的完美結合，讓 Incredibox 適合每個人。由於 Incredibox 讓學習變得有趣且具娛樂性，現在廣為全球各地學校使用。

怎麼玩？很簡單！將圖示拖放到虛擬人物上讓他們唱歌，然後開始創作你的音樂。找對的聲音組合，解鎖動畫合唱，增強你的旋律。

只要你的作品聽起來很棒，就儲存並分享，以盡可能獲得投票。假如你獲得足夠的票數，就能進入 Incredibox 歷史，加入 50 強排行榜！準備好展示你的作品了嗎？

你還可以從應用程式中將你的混音曲下載成 MP3 反覆聆聽！

懶得創作自己的混音曲？沒問題，讓自動模式為你播放吧！

調高音量，輕鬆一下 ;)

****************
Incredibox，來自法國里昂，於 2009 年創立的 So Far So Good 工作室的心血結晶。最初以網頁形式出現，隨後推出了移動及平板應用程式，迅速成為熱門產品。它贏得了多項獎項，並出現在各大國際媒體上，包括：BBC、Adobe、FWA、Gizmodo、Slate、Konbini、Softonic、Kotaku、Cosmopolitan、PocketGamer、AppAdvice、AppSpy、Vice、Ultralinx 等等。線上演示影片自創建以來已吸引超過 1 億訪問者。

tw.releaseNotes: - Privacy compliance adjustment
tw.description:
《手機帝國》是一款以“造手機”為題材的高自由度單機模擬經營遊戲。你扮演一名回到2001年的創業者，因為獨到的眼光拿到了神秘投資人的啟動資金，進而創立了一家可能改變世界的科技企業。遊戲從2001年開始到2035年結束，你將從研發最早期的九宮格智能手機開始，一直到研發可完全獨立使用的AR智能眼鏡結束。在這35年時間裡，你將親歷、見證、推動智能手機波瀾壯闊的發展歷程，並有機會把你的公司發展成為世界第一的科技企業。

• 有深度的玩法
《手機帝國》的核心玩法是研發更好的圖紙、升級更牛的科技、打造更強的團隊、研發更好的手機、賺取更多的利潤，如此循環。而“如何用人”是整個遊戲的精髓所在，根據員工的能力、天賦和技能，把合適的員工放到合適的崗位才會發揮出其最大潛能。員工的配合還會觸發團隊突破效果，這是一個可以讓你突破科技限制從而創造奇蹟的新機制。

• 充足的遊戲時長
《手機帝國》的遊戲內時間長達35年，將從2001年開始到2035年結束，你將親歷、見證、推動智能手機波瀾壯闊的發展歷程。

• 海量的內容
你在遊戲中可研發經典的九宮格手機、全鍵盤手機、早期觸控手機、全面屏手機、折疊屏手機，甚至未來的AR智能眼鏡，總共有超過100種手機外觀供你研究。

• 不斷進階的科技
遊戲中的電池、屏幕、材質、相機等均可不斷升級，在你資金充裕時甚至可以啟動CPU和操作系統的自研項目，你將有可能研發出性能逆天的芯片來大幅提升自己的手機品質。

• 新穎的競爭體驗
你作為科技公司的CEO將與各個時期的科技巨頭們展開競爭，你可以選擇和他們搞好關係共謀發展，也可以為爭奪優秀人才展開挖人大戰。

• 大量的隨機事件
為了增加遊戲的世界感，我們在遊戲中融入了大量的隨機事件，包括：世界事件、行業新聞、危機事件、幸運事件、員工事件、記者採訪等等，甚至還包括比如太空電梯、火星登陸、 AI大爆發等未來事件。

• 獨創的說服系統
為了更好的模擬現實生活中的人才招攬過程，我們在遊戲中內置了一款小遊戲，該遊戲以古老的“九型人格”為原型，玩家需要根據招募對象的不同人格類型，採用不同的溝通技巧和策略來說服對方。越是頂級的人才，說服的難度越高。

• 更多等待你探索的內容
遊戲中還包括信用評級、企業併購、情報系統、員工培養、公司戰略等其他好玩的元素等待你來探索。

*簡體中文 (Simplified Chinese)
*English

推薦配置

存儲空間：1.5GB

Email：indie@xindong.com

tw.description:
JuicyRealm是一款滿世界打奇異水果敵人的動作遊戲，在這個世界里，動物跟植物的界限已被打破，一場食物鏈的顛覆拉開了序幕。人類不得不在第一個發現異化植物的區域建立前哨站並開始調查，軍方也準備了數目眾多的強大武器，由你帶領一支先遣軍開始了一場曠日持久的拉鋸戰。

【顛覆的秩序】
『多年以後，人類看著植物站上食物鏈的頂端，準會想起自己那長久以來的無知與傲慢……』
當所有的植物都開始進化成動物，長出手腳，擁有智能，人類才意識到那些原本只會光合作用的藤條們的威脅。沒有人知道為何植物會在這麼短的時間裡完成了動物數億年的進化，更沒有人知道它們的目標是什麼。唯一確定的是，這是人類站上食物鏈頂端以來最難以置信的一次挑戰。

【遊戲玩法】
作為這個未知領域的第一批探險者，你需要不斷深入敵人的巢穴，打敗形色各異的水果敵人，同時搜尋更多的裝備並用收集到的資源強化自己。

【遊戲特性】
RogueLike元素，隨機組合的場景，寶物，怪物
上百種各具特色的武器和道具
數十種不同特性的小怪和Boss
多達十位可操作角色，各有不同技能與特長
獨特的畫面質感，豐富的細節表現

Twitter: /@JuicyRealm
Facebook: @JuicyRealm
Press contact: juicyrealm@spacecangames.com
©2020 X.D. Network Inc. All rights reserved.

【推薦設備】

請確保你的設備高於如下配置，如果使用早期設備，遊戲可能無法在您的設備上運行。
iPhone 6S以上機型
iPad Air 2以上機型
iPad Mini 4以上機型

tw.releaseNotes: Bug Fix
tw.description:
To the Moon繁體中文版全新上市。這是一個像素畫微型遊戲。全程只有幾個小時，且沒有戰鬥，但是其憑藉巧妙細膩的敘事方式，打動人心的音樂以及發人深思的主題獲得了全球玩家的共鳴，同時收穫了諸多好評。其中就包括了權威媒體Gamespot最佳劇本，Metacritic最佳遊戲及WIRED最佳遊戲等重要大獎，還獲得了今年Steam“我沒有哭，只是眼睛裡進了點沙子”的獎項提名。
遊戲是由心動網路獲得授權，並負責在手機上高畫質重製，是一款經典劇情向RPG遊戲。原作PC版由加拿大華裔製作人Kan Gao和他的獨立遊戲開發團隊Freebird Games於6年前發售，好評如潮。

[關於手機重製版]
• 新解鎖29個新的 imessage 貼紙
• 新增音樂盒功能，支持後台播放/下載遊戲內音樂（通關後自動開啟）
• 新增 DIY 二維碼分享功能，一鍵分享，多設備隨時同步遊戲進度。
• 保留原版像素風格，高畫質重製的全新遊戲畫面
• 完全重製的全新UI介面選單
• 特別針對手機螢幕重新優化了點觸操作，還新增了搖杆操作
• 自動隨時存檔，想玩就玩，無壓力

[遊戲特色]
• 一個獨特的非戰鬥型故事的遊戲體驗
• 完美結合冒險元素和經典RPG美學的創新組合
• 備受讚譽的原創音樂與遊戲情節的推演絲絲入扣
• 一個濃縮式的劇情安排讓人盡情體驗原汁原味的動人故事

[故事概要]
這是一個講述兩個醫生藉由改變記憶為彌留之際的人們完成他們人生最後願望的故事。羅莎莉恩醫生（Dr. Rosalene）和沃茨醫生（Dr. Watts）有一份非常特殊的工作：他們可以給人們重活一次的機會，從人生的最開始重頭來過，當然這個機會只存在於將死之人的頭腦裡。

由於其帶來的嚴重後果，新的人工記憶將取代真實記憶成為病人臨終前記住的事，所以透過修改記憶去滿足人們最後願望的這種技術只能對臨死的人實施。

這個特別的故事讓玩家跟隨兩位醫生為實現一個老人約翰尼（Johnny）的夢想而進入他的記憶。隨著每一步時間的推移，約翰尼過去的一個個新的片段將被慢慢揭示。兩位醫生將約翰尼記憶中一直困擾他的許多事件重組在一起，他們試圖找出究竟是何原因會讓身體虛弱的老人臨死前要實現這樣的願望。

而約翰尼（Johnny）的最後心願竟是…去月球。

tw.description:
[遊戲說明]

由幻刃網絡研發，心動網絡發行的《ICEY》是一款2D橫版動作遊戲，跟隨旁白的指示，你將會通過ICEY的眼睛去看，去戰鬥並發掘在遊戲中世界的真相。但其實，這也根本不是一款2D橫版動作遊戲，你也不會通過ICEY的眼睛去看，你也不會去探尋這個世界的真相。

本質上說《ICEY》是一款Meta遊戲，玩家需要通過對抗旁白的指示，思考何爲遊戲、何爲真相等等命題。在《ICEY》中，你扮演的是ICEY，而非“你自己”。當然你也可以扮演“你自己”，而非ICEY。這是一個包裹著動作遊戲外衣的陷阱。

現在，就是你發掘其真正故事的時刻。

[遊戲特色]

·高速戰鬥： 高速移動，將敵人玩弄于股掌之中。 不能遲疑，當機立斷進行攻擊、反擊或是閃避！ 這才是你的生存之道！ 

·華麗的連招系統： 操作簡單，稍微練習即可打出華麗連擊。 不同技能各有特性，靈活組合才能順利過關。 

·巨型Boss戰： 衆多超巨型Boss，充滿壓迫力的戰鬥場面。 Boss攻擊方法多樣，只有找出破綻才能化險爲夷。 

·Meta元素： 玩家在整個遊戲進行中需結合旁白判斷自己下一步的行動。 但是，通過對碎片信息的分析及整理，玩家會漸漸改變自己的行爲及思考模式去進行遊戲並探索其中真正的劇情及核心內容。 跟隨指引，還是叛逆而爲。

一切，由你決定。你，准備好了嗎？	

［獲獎榮耀］

-Nominated, Tokyo Game Show 2016 電擊PlayStation Best Indie Games
-Official Selection, 2016 Gamescom Indie Arena Booth
-Most Promising Game 2nd Prize, Taipei Game Show 2016
-Official Selection, Casual Connect Asia 2016
-Official Selection, Reboot Develop Indie Award 2016
-Official Selection, IGF China 2015
-Best Technology Award, Indieplay 2015
-Official Score 9.5/10 & Editors's Choice by PlayStationLifeStyle

Languages Supported:
*English
*Francais
*Español
*简体中文 (Simplified Chinese)
*繁体中文 (Traditional Chinese)

操作系統
iOS：8.0及更高版本

推薦配置
運行內存：2 GB及更多
存儲空間：1.2 GB（iOS）

提示
-遊戲的流暢性與穩定性可能受屏幕分辨率和後台應用程序數量影響
可通過調整畫質選項，在畫面，流暢度與電量消耗之間平衡

tw.description:
《無處遁形：全網公敵》是Steam平臺廣受好評的劇情向駭客解密遊戲《全網公敵》手遊版本。玩家通過網絡蒐索和社工手段獲取目標人物資訊，其隱藏最深的秘密都無處遁形。遊戲中的每個故事看似各自獨立，但隨著劇情的發展卻是草蛇灰線，伏脈千里。當所有事件串聯起來，竟隱藏著驚天的秘密……

希望玩家在遊玩的同時，對網絡本身也能產生反思，學會保護好個人隱私。

【遊戲內容】
◆第一章：程式師之死
某公司CEO跳樓自殺，自稱被毒妻勒索千萬； 而妻子卻在社交網絡上發佈被家暴的照片。 謠言滿天，誰在說謊？
◆第二章：看不見的眼睛
女大學生的不雅視頻在網絡瘋傳，這一刻，她已然社會性死亡。 到底誰才是始作俑者？ 女性的安全又該由誰去保護？
◆第三章：消失的證據
品學兼優的學生會長忽然失踪。 霸淩事件使案情越發撲朔迷離。 誰是兇手，誰是受害者？
◆第四章：羞辱的代價
天降巨瓜，女歌星再次被爆黑料！ 恐嚇信、炒作、前女團成員自殺事件……網絡再掀輿論狂歡！
◆第五章：永生代碼
當社會陷入癲狂，你是否也願意加入永生代碼，獲得真正的愛與永生？
◆DLC：甜蜜之家
一個看似甜蜜而美滿的家庭背後，每個人都有各自的秘密，隱藏在背後的真相到底是什麼？！
◆DLC：HelloWorld
一場離奇的車禍，讓泰坦公司的高級研究員Lucrezia Borgia博士當場死亡，同行的Benjamin Engle死裡逃生，但他卻沒有意識到自己即將捲入一場巨大的陰謀之中……

【遊戲特點】
◆代入感强：在虛構的世界裏，玩家扮演一名駭客，接受一家公司委託，完成一個個不同的社工事件，體驗真實的駭客操作。
◆玩法多樣：遊戲內有多個系統，除了社工系統，還會有推理、追跡、解謎，破壞侵入等系統需要玩家們去一一攻破。
◆劇情複雜：遊戲中你將面臨大量的選擇和謎題，而不同的選擇可能將導致不同的結局。
◆人物眾多：登場人物眾多，每個人物都有自己的性格特點，而他們背後都有著不為人知的故事，需要作為駭客的你去一一發現事件的真相。
◆全程配音：遊戲中所有出現的角色都有真人配音，讓整個遊戲的體驗和代入感更加强烈。
◆原創音樂：多首原創主題曲以及各種音樂音效，搭配精彩劇情，享受震撼體驗。

【覈心功能】
◆網絡蒐索：玩家通過瀏覽器搜索功能收集目標對象的基礎資訊。
◆資料庫：利用已知資訊輸入到資料庫中，通過篩選後或許目標對象的其他資訊。
◆破解：通過獲得的目標人物資訊來生成密碼，用於登入各平臺的帳戶（包括郵箱、社交平臺、聊天軟體等）。
◆偽裝：獲取目標對象的需求、社交圈等，根據資訊選擇偽裝，通過和目標對象接觸獲取更多資訊。
◆聊天溝通：添加目標對象為好友後，進行聊天溝通獲取資訊。
◆圖片分析：從圖片中獲取有價值的資訊內容及相關線索。
當然，後期還會解鎖更多的高階社工方法！

延續「1941 Frozen Front」的戰鬥，惟這一次，打的是海戰。加入海軍，打贏生死存亡之戰！稱雄戰場，派遣戰士奔赴前線。最真實的軍事作戰！
選擇正確戰術，運用突擊隊，擊潰頑敵！既可以在戰役中指揮美軍，也可以在戰鬥中統領日軍。步兵、炮兵、坦克、飛機、戰艦、潛艇，多兵種協同作戰，消滅敵軍幫兇；PACIFIC FRONT，以靈活的指揮技巧獲得晉升！

魚雷、炸彈，強大武器上陣作戰！

轟炸機群，搗毀敵軍指揮部！
潛艇偷襲，令敵軍防不勝防！
在惡劣地形中佈置你的炮兵部隊！
清除灘頭、湖泊、海峽的各種障礙！
伏擊敵人！ 
為部隊提供物資和彈藥！
護衛航母及戰艦群！

tw.description:
你是否曾經在物理考試前的最後一分鐘，臨急抱佛腳，卻發現筆記找不到、公式記不起來？別擔心！「Physchingg Lab」 就是你的救星，讓你隨時隨地玩遊戲、記物理知識，考試溫書再也不頭痛！

Phy識大亂鬥：玩卡牌配對遊戲及物理問答的同時，偷偷記住那些令人頭痛的定義和公式！
互動物理模擬實驗：體驗逼真的電場線、質能轉換、波動等模擬實驗，抽象概念瞬間變具體！
錯題本神器：解決「錯了又錯」的煩惱！自動整理你的錯題，還能一鍵匯出 PDF，讓你隨身帶著溫習。
實驗室探索模式：在虛擬實驗室中自由探索，調整參數觀察現象變化，培養科學思維！
自製卡片溫習庫：溫書也要個性化！製作屬於自己的溫習卡片，雞精式記住最重要的內容。
討論留言專區：與同學互相切磋，出題、許願、分享學習心得！
1分鐘速記中英定義和公式：考試前快速掃一眼，讓知識像雞精一樣瞬間濃縮進腦袋！

不管是 DSE 學生還是任何需要短期記憶加速的人，這款 app 都能助你一臂之力！
快來下載「Physchingg Lab」，讓物理學習變得更有趣、更高效！唔好臨急抱佛腳，不如抱我！

tw.releaseNotes: 可以在 英語 繁體中文 簡體中文 韓文 的語言環境下遊玩了喔！
tw.description:
穿過掛簾，眼前就是極樂世界……
打造最暖心的溫泉旅館吧！

大幅新增了甕浴溫泉、足浴溫泉與露天溫泉等新設施！
打造你獨一無二的溫泉鄉，成為世界矚目的熱門旅館吧！

首先可以隨心所欲地配置「乒乓球桌」、「商店」與「鐵桶溫泉」等多彩多姿的設施，
再安排美好旅行不可或缺的美味料理－－從料亭、壽司店到拉麵店……就連挑剔的客人都可能為之折服！

只要栽種杜鵑花或櫻花樹等植物，就能一年四季陶醉在美景之中。散發著溫和光芒的夜景，也是別有一番風味。

另外還有消除疲勞與滋潤肌膚這些令人開心的溫泉功效，也值得注意！！
據說只要泡過在美容室、甜品店、繡球花附近的溫泉，就能讓肌膚有如嬰兒般滑嫩！？

為了振興地區，投資與觀光景點的整頓也不會少！
投資「祥和森林」、「遊樂園」、「滑雪場」等觀光勝地，吸引更多客人吧！
這麼一來或許就會有團體客前來預約旅遊行程－－決定旅遊計畫，讓大家一起度過美好的一天吧！

可能造訪的客人從全家大小、甜蜜戀人到追求心靈祥和的獨行客－－甚至連喬裝出遊的超級巨星都有！？
發展為來客源源不絕的著名旅館後，或許就有機會被刊登在世界級的旅遊指南上！？

努力打造一個能為心靈充電、為人們帶來笑容的五星級旅館吧！

--
對應輕觸拖曳、放大縮小等功能。

其它遊戲請透過關鍵字「Kairosoft」來進行搜索。https://kairopark.jp
還有支援移動設備/電腦的遊戲發展國物語等免費遊戲哦。

請跟隨我們的Twitter，以獲得最新資訊！

tw.releaseNotes: Fixed missing audio localization in Immortal Throne
tw.description:
有史以來最好的劈砍遊戲現在能夠放進您的口袋裡了！

最初於2006年在電腦上發布的《泰坦之旅》是一款動作角色扮演遊戲，設定為神話的背景。泰坦從監獄逃脫，不顧一切地要毀滅地球。上帝自個不能阻止他們-需要一個英雄來領導這場史詩般的爭鬥。勝利或失敗都將決定人類的命運和奧林匹亞的命運。

您就是英雄！創建您的角色，探索遠古的文明如希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國，並與成群的傳奇生物戰鬥！掌握射箭、劍法或者魔法的藝術，併升級您的角色來解鎖令人驚嘆的力量！發現特別的項目來幫助您完成您的任務：傳說中的劍，毀滅性的雷電，施了魔法的弓，以及更多！

這個特別適用於移動設備的新版本提供了許多新的特點：

● 全新的點觸操作界面
● 完全重新設計的點觸遊戲
● 高品質的圖形
● 巨大的、開放的世界供您探索
● 完全的日/夜循環
● 80種不同的神話生物：牛頭人身怪，獨眼巨人，蛇發女妖和更多
● 1200多個等待您去發現的項目
● 30個不同的角色分類
● 150種不同的角色技能
● 超過60個小時的巨量遊戲時間
● 逐級增進的難度模式：與您的技能水平匹配的武器和敵人
● 數十種不可鎖定的成就等待您去發現
● 無廣告，沒有微交易。

混合了遠古神話和不停的動作的《泰坦之旅》是一款典型的劈砍遊戲，以快速、激烈的節奏提供活力十足的遊戲。征服驚心動魄的挑戰，戰勝入侵移動世界的最強大敵人！

可在應用內購買的DLC： 
● 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。
● 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！
● 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！
● 在永恆餘燼DLC 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

關於此遊戲：
《地城謎蹤》是一款考驗玩家 2D 空間邏輯和技能運用的解謎遊戲，你可以用劍打倒身旁的怪物、用弓箭攻擊遠處的敵人、用盾牌推動障礙物、甚至可以用手套拉動怪物改變他的位置。

此遊戲總共有 150 個精心設計的關卡，玩家必須要充分了解遊戲的機制才能順利過關。

而若要達成進階目標，則需要針對解法進行最佳化，有的時候甚至要拋棄原本的解法，重新以不同角度去觀察和思考才能達成。

tw.description:
人類！我是Bob，來自《人類跌落夢境（Human: Fall Flat）》裏的一名“沒有骨氣”的軟體怪。

《人類跌落夢境（Human: Fall Flat）》有著多樣的物理交互規則，鬼畜是妳的奧義，妳甚至可以躺在地上全身電臀抖動，與自己的隊友們手拉手闖關，享受被隊友坑害，推下懸崖，或是被當做炮彈發射的整個過程。遊戲依然是一次購買，沒有其他收費服務。更重要的是，沙雕的併不只有Bob一個，多達八人好友一起陪妳，還可以隨時隨地邀請他們一起降智，在聯機中互相葬送各自的友誼。

在手機上玩玩家自制的內容？Bob不止一種面孔，既是火影忍者，還要兼職外賣，曾經西裝革履，現在專職海盜。手機上會不斷更新PC創意工坊中的優秀內容，讓妳和妳的朋友們有更多搞怪故事發生！

-沙雕玩法，鬼畜新世界，物理碰撞出的沙雕結果，遠在妳想象之外。
-優化了動作操作，低上手門檻使妳做出許多觸手怪才能做出的動作。
-八人聯機的規模讓智商呈8倍降落，根本擋不住，好友互關語音--邀請讓友誼聯繫起來更方便。
-持續搬運&移植更新創意工坊玩家自製沙雕內容。
-遊戲界面現在更簡潔好看了，只為襯托妳的沙雕之旅。

【邂逅3位性格迥異的美少女】
從零開始的親密生活！牽手、擁抱、親吻......等等！這段青春戀愛物語竟如此順利！？事情的發展已持續跳出思考範圍，dokidoki的感覺還能繼續保持下去嗎！



【體驗無厘頭的玩法對撞】
收集線索，完成別樣的密室解謎；拔出屎中劍，展開回合制戰鬥；公路逃亡，誰都需要配備一把粉紅手槍！前進的關鍵點，或許在于妳的腦洞是否夠大。



【感受沈浸式的主角視角】
獨特的美術風格，爆笑的分鏡CG，在漫畫世界裏作主角，體驗不一樣的文字冒險！全線女主配音追加，快來解鎖3位美少女的語音對白！


【解鎖意料之外的多種結局】
分別與3位美少女展開經曆驚心動魄的故事，35種結局，究竟哪一個才是和她的Happy Ending？



【DLC：世界只是一直在旋轉】
全新DLC推出！世界只是一直在旋轉，銀發少女也在期待，能夠一直被堅定地選擇......

tw.trackName: 戲曲鑼鼓 - 電子鑼鼓打擊墊｜虛擬樂器｜演奏模擬器｜戲曲伴奏
tw.description:
戲曲鑼鼓是一款專為戲曲愛好者打造的虛擬打擊樂器應用程式，讓你在手機或平板上，隨時隨地體驗傳統戲曲鑼鼓演奏的魅力。應用程式內收錄多種經典戲曲打擊樂器，並支援高度自訂配置，滿足不同戲曲流派、演奏風格與個人創作需求。本應用程式主要具備以下特色：

- 簡單易用，初學者友善：介面簡潔直觀，無論是戲曲初學者還是專業愛好者，都能快速上手。透過觸控螢幕即可輕鬆演奏，隨時體驗傳統鑼鼓節奏。

- 豐富的戲曲鑼鼓樂器：內建多種經典戲曲打擊樂器，如大鼓、大堂鼓、小堂鼓、大鑼、小鑼、風鑼、鐃鈸、小鈸、廣鈸、板鼓、板、梆子、碰鈴、木魚、引磬、鐺子、大磬、鐘、手鼓，並提供不同力度音色，還原真實演奏體驗。

- 高效能無延遲演奏：敲擊即響，聲音反應迅速；支援快速連續擊打、多點觸控與多音同時演奏，演奏流暢不卡頓、不串音。

- 強大的鍵盤自訂系統：支援自由調整鍵盤佈局、行列數量、按鍵大小與間距，支援拖拽交換按鍵位置，支援背景外觀配置，打造更符合個人習慣的戲曲鑼鼓演奏介面。

- 靈活的按鍵配置：支援按鍵顏色自訂、按鍵圖片顯示、按鍵名稱修改等功能，每個按鍵最多可綁定 3 個樂器音色，實現個人化鑼鼓經與專屬打擊墊配置。

- 錄音與回放功能：支援即時錄製戲曲鑼鼓演奏過程，一鍵保存精彩演奏內容，並可隨時回放練習成果，方便記錄靈感、複盤節奏與分享作品。

立即下載，開啟屬於你的戲曲鑼鼓演奏之旅！如遇到錯誤或有任何意見與建議，請聯絡電子郵件：yuliuapp@icloud.com

tw.description:
重要
它不支持：iPhone 5S，iPad Air，iPad Mini 2＆3和iPod Touch

This Is the Police 2是廣受好評的黑色劇“This Is the Police”的續集，你可以在其中酌情解釋法律！運行警長的部門，管理你的員警，調查，審問和監禁。在這個由故事推動的冒險、戰略和回合制戰術戰鬥混合遊戲中，做出艱難的決定 - 並儘量避免自己入獄！

這是模擬？管理遊戲？戰術挑戰？視覺小說？謎題？全部都是，還不止！

深入獨一無二的故事推動體驗。
歡迎來到夏普伍德，一個寒冷而嚴酷的邊境小鎮，充滿了暴力，沒有人是完全無辜的。這個城鎮是走私者、幫派和尖叫的民粹主義者的老巢。為了維護和平與秩序，年輕的警長莉莉·裡德（莎拉·漢密爾頓）不得不與逃犯傑克·博伊德（喬恩·聖約翰）合作，並祈禱她的危險計畫不會失控。

掌管警長的部門。
你的下屬不僅僅是一些資源，他們是有各自長處、弱點、恐懼和偏見的活人 - 為了存活，你必須應對所有這些人。你的人喝得太多了嗎？或者總是有不上班的藉口？還是他拒絕遵守命令？如果想在這個部門維持紀律，你必須施展堅定的手腕。

參與戰術戰鬥。
在最危險的操作中，遊戲將切換到回合制戰鬥。召集你最好的員警團隊。仔細研究地形，調整計畫，悄悄接近嫌疑人並使用非致命武器和裝備 - 如果情況允許的話。沒錯，有時槍戰幾乎是不可避免的，但要小心：“This Is the Police 2”遊戲沒有生命值。一顆子彈就可能讓員警喪命。

成為一名真正的偵探。
收集證據，研究案件材料，審問嫌犯並將罪犯送上法庭。如果嫌疑人是無辜的？也許是時候看看是否可以收買夏普伍德的法官。

在期盼已久的 「  Clouds & Sheep 」遊戲續集中，可愛的羊羣終於再次得以解放！完成無數任務，滿足綿羊朋友的需求。種植花草樹木並剪不同顏色的羊毛來採購資源！收集快樂星星，收割木材和花瓣，並用它們來爲羊羣提供食物、飾品、玩具和其他東西！控制雲朵，及時降雨，確保綿羊永遠都不會缺飲用水。如果你的綿羊感到高興且滿足，牠們就會生下小羔羊！

每只動物都需要你的關注！這些滾圓的綿羊喜歡休閒娛樂！讓你的綿羊跳躍起來，並使用蹦牀、蹺蹺板和鞦韆主動和牠們一起玩耍！旁觀你的寵物們互相交流，給牠們一些物品，然後觀察牠們的反應！使用有趣的物品自定義你的羊羣牧場，並從狂野西域和海盜領域等不同設定中進行選擇。旁觀你的羊羣白天不知疲憊地奔跑，而到了晚上就依着溫暖的篝火而眠。儘可能讓綿羊保持心情愉快、身體健康，防牠們變成天空中綿狀的大雲朵。

特色：
- 去除廣告！
- 一流遊戲「  Clouds & Sheep 」的精彩續集
- 踏上史詩般的探險之路，找到傳奇般的青春泉水！
- 擁有可愛綿羊的模擬遊戲
- 照顧好羊羣
- 飼養甜美的小羔羊
- 積極和羊羣玩耍
- 給牠們提供許多不同的物品
- 種植並收割不同的資源

- 適合兒童，但全家人一起玩也非常有趣
- 支持MFi遊戲手柄
- 支持Game Center

tw.description:
《籠中窺夢》是一款「視錯覺」解謎遊戲，由兩人工作室Optillusion開發完成。

遊戲的內容全部包含在一個神秘的立方體中，立方體的每個面都是一個獨立的世界：工廠，燈塔，遊樂園，教堂等等，他們之間看似毫不相關，實則交錯萬千，充滿了意想不到的關聯……

【燒腦視錯覺解謎】
發揮你的腦洞與想象力，找到那些平凡場景與物體之間的聯系，產生意想不到的奇妙互動，拼接，然後見證奇跡誕生。

【收集照片拼湊故事】
謎題背後，遊戲還有一個等待著被玩家們發現並反轉的故事。通過收集照片拼湊故事，試著解開它隱藏的真相吧。

【多重提示杜絕卡關】
遊戲包含多種解謎引導機製，包括最基礎的「視覺引導」，幫助你快速定位關鍵物品；而「文字提示」則可以幫你整理解謎思路；最後還有「視頻提示」，用終極手段保證你絕不會卡關。

【拿下獎章證明實力】

tw.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

tw.description:
經典的砍殺遊戲終於推出 iOS 版，Heart Machine這款曾獲獎的遊戲現在以最精良且優質的特殊版本登場。


► 在享有盛譽的獨立遊戲節（Independent Games Festival）中獲得觀眾人氣大獎以及最佳視覺美術獎。

► 在最佳視覺設計、最佳音效以及最佳原創遊戲類別中獲得超過 14 項提名。

► 9/10 Destructoid – 卓越表現的典範。儘管有缺失但仍瑕不掩瑜，且不至於對遊戲造成重大影響。

► 9.5/10 Game Informer – 配樂、美術以及打鬥場景值得您沉浸其中並深入探索。

► Eurogamer 推薦 – Heart Machine 開發的砍殺遊戲不僅充滿挑戰性，且非常細緻，畫面也十分漂亮。

► 9/10 GameSpot – 不僅僅是單純的畫面漂亮；《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》所呈現的視覺效果可以指引您，且讓您放鬆。在緊張刺激的打鬥場景中，壯觀美景能讓您稍喘口氣。 

► 8.5 Polygon – 無論是思考戰略的時刻或是驚險的動作場景，《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》取得了兩者之間的完美平衡。

► Darkstation 5 顆星–上帝視角的動作角色扮演遊戲《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》非常棒：漂亮、迷人的世界供探索、遊戲操作靈敏、悅耳的配樂，並且對玩家有信心，相信他們可以自己想出遊戲進行的方式。


黑暗且暴力的過往陰影籠罩著這片不羈之地，當中滿是寶藏與鮮血。這個世界的旅者是收藏家，專門收集遺忘的知識、失落的科技以及破碎的歷史。我們的旅者被一種無法滿足的疾病纏身，朝著時間埋葬之地深入挺進，希望能找到治癒重症的方法。

《光明旅者Hyper Light Drifter》是動作冒險角色扮演遊戲，使用經典的16-bit 模式，再加上現代化的遊戲機制與更大規模的設計。探索這個美麗且廣大的荒廢之地，當中危機四伏且暗藏著失落科技。


特色：

● 支援 iPad Pro 120 fps 的畫面幀率/支援 iPhone 與 iPad 60 fps的畫面幀率。
● 與 MFi 控制手把相容。
● 遊戲中心（Game Center）成就。
● 觸覺震動。
● 從每一位角色到細緻的背景元素，一切都是手繪動畫的心血傑作。
● 容易上手但難以駕馭；敵人又壞又多，處處危機讓您脆弱的身體不堪一擊，且盟友又寥寥可數。
● 升級武器、學習新技能、探索裝備，在這個黑暗且暗藏細節的世界中，穿越一條條的路徑支線，揭開秘密。
● 沉浸在由Disasterpeace 所作的美妙配樂中。
● 不僅有原始遊戲中的所有內容，再加上更多武器、敵人以及特殊版本的區域。

us.releaseNotes:
ScoreMaster gets a major scoring experience update:

  - Cleaner scoring screen with stronger score focus
  - New scoreboard display mode that hides distracting controls
  - Edit player names, colors, and player count during a game
  - Enter a custom Step value directly
  - Quick Adjust now supports x1 / x10 / x100 multipliers
  - Quick Adjust includes a built-in number pad for faster input
  - Press and hold to continuously add or subtract points
  - Improved sorting behavior to reduce accidental taps
  - Added App Store rating and Share App actions

us.description:
Say goodbye to messy pen and paper! ScoreMaster is an all-in-one app designed specifically for board game and card game players. We handle the tedious calculations and physical accessories so you can focus 100% on the fun of the game.

Perfectly Supports All Your Favorite Games:
* Classic Board Games: Catan, Carcassonne, Rummikub
* Card Games & Poker: Poker, Magic: The Gathering (MTG), Pokémon TCG, Yu-Gi-Oh!
* Party & Social Deduction: Werewolf, Avalon, Codenames
* RPGs: Dungeons & Dragons (D&D) and any custom scoring games
Six Core Features:
* Intuitive Scoring: Supports multiple players. Add or subtract points with a single tap on a clean, distraction-free interface.
* Match History: Automatically saves final scores and historical match records for every game you play.
* First Player Selector: Multiple players touch the screen to randomly pick the starting player in just one second.
* Random Dice Roller: Built-in virtual dice. Roll instantly with a tap—never worry about forgetting physical dice again.
* Countdown Timer: Customizable sand timer, essential for time-limited party games and trivia.
* Versus Timer (Chess Clock): Dedicated 2-player turn timer. Say goodbye to slow play and keep competitive matches fair.
Download ScoreMaster today and make your next game night smoother and more professional!

If you love music and want to master your bass guitar in perfection like Richard Bona, Stanley Clarke, John Patitucci, Billy Sheehan, Victor Wooten, Gary Willis, or even better, then you just need to have this app!!!

Demo video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2LPNsS2F6bs

This app is a great collection of bass guitar modes, that gives you an excellent original material for improvisations and solo on the bass! Bass Modes Symmetry School is a triple horizontal system, in which modes are played with three notes on each string. Today many progressive bass guitarists use the wide extended fingering instead of usual traditional. This school presents "horizontal-extended" fingering, that helps you to perform modes in 1-2 octaves bound. The material in this school is also irreplaceable if you want to master a shredding bass technique. The app will be useful as for beginners, so for professionals!

●●●●● Bass Modes Symmetry School features: 
--------------------------------------
- 3-notes-per-string approach works perfectly for bass
- Easy learning of modes
- Ability to achieve fast performance speed (●SHREDDING●)
- Theoretical and practical usage for guitar, bass and piano players
- Given material works best with jazz but also can be used for latin, pop, funk, rock, etc. 
- This school will work for a beginner as well as for intermediate and advanced players. 

●●●●● App Features: 
------------------ 
● 322 + 23 (new) types of different bass modes, which can be easily transposed, resulting in about 3,800 of total modes!
● Harmony feature: you can see and listen to the chords, over which given modes can be played. More information about these chords you can find in our "International Guitar Chords 1 & 2" apps 
● Every mode is provided with corresponding optimal fingerings for your comfort 
● Transpose modes to any desired key by dragging notes on the screen with your finger
● Metrotone with adjustable tempo and time signature can be used as a trainer

● Cursor can display note names or fingering (selectable)

● designed both for iPhone and iPad

us.description:
Save time and make your day more efficient with this simple and clean widget calendar.
Check and manage your dates and events right from your iPhone home screen.

◦ Home Screen Widgets: Three widget sizes (small, medium, large) are supported. Place calendar widgets and event list widgets where you want to see your schedule at a glance.

◦ Interactive Widgets: Tap any date in the widget to instantly see events for that day, and use the month/week/day navigation buttons to browse other dates. You can also complete reminders directly from the widget to manage your schedule without opening the app.

◦ Versatile Event Display: Show events on the calendar as color bars, dots, numbers, and more. Automatically optimized for your widget size.

◦ Clean Calendar View: Enjoy a simple and clean monthly/weekly calendar. Displays events from all calendars synced to iCloud, including the iPhone Calendar, Google Calendar, Exchange, and more.

◦ Reminders Integration: View your iOS Reminders alongside your events on the calendar, and complete them directly from the widget. Manage events and tasks in one place.

◦ Lunar Calendar: Supports both Korean and Chinese lunar calendars. View lunar dates on your calendar so you never miss a holiday or a lunar birthday.

◦ Anniversary Management: Save and manage important dates like birthdays and wedding anniversaries. Supports both solar and lunar anniversaries, with notifications at the time of your choice.

◦ D-Day: Track days remaining until important dates with D-Day. Past dates appear as D+, so you can grasp anniversaries at a glance.

◦ Add Events: Add events you want to save to your calendar with just one tap from the widget.

◦ Event Search: Find what you're looking for fast with one-tap search. You can also narrow your search by date range.

◦ iCloud Backup: Anniversary data is automatically backed up and synced via iCloud. Your data stays safe even when you switch devices.

◦ Dark Mode: Optimized colors for both light and dark mode for a comfortable experience anytime.

If you have any questions or run into issues, please email us at 'dayseed.help@gmail.com'. :D

◦ This app supports Korean, English, Chinese, and Japanese.

us.description:
This is a fantastical tale of an exotic land. The Old Empire has fallen, leaving rival tribes to fight for control of the great desert. Little do they know of the seeds of darkness which grow in the shadows with each passing day...

Sands of Salzaar is an open-world strategy-action RPG set across a sprawling desert. Build up and manage your forces from a single unit to a mighty army, then lead them into massive battles against your foes. How you progress is up to you: customize your hero with a wide variety of skills and talents, choose which factions to side with, and plan your strategies carefully to establish yourself as whoever you aspire to be - a lone wolf, a wealthy trader, a city lord, or a war schemer.

us.description:
Incredibox lets you create your own music with the help of a merry crew of beatboxers. Choose your musical style to start laying down, recording and sharing your mix. Get your groove on with hip-hop beats, electro waves, pop voices, jazzy swing, Brazilian rhythms and much more. As well, discover a selection of mods created by the community. Plenty to keep you mixing for hours, with no ads or microtransactions.

Part game, part tool, Incredibox is above all an audio and visual experience that has quickly become a hit with people of all ages. The right mix of music, graphics, animation and interactivity makes Incredibox ideal for everyone. And because it makes learning fun and entertaining, Incredibox is now being used by schools all over the world.

How to play? Easy! Drag and drop icons onto the avatars to make them sing and start to compose your own music. Find the right sound combos to unlock animated choruses that will enhance your tune.

Once your composition sounds great, just save it and share it to get as many votes as possible. If you get enough votes, you may go down in Incredibox history by joining the Top 50 chart! Ready to show your stuff?

You can also download your mix as an MP3 from the app and listen to it over and over again!

Too lazy to create your own mix? No problem, just let the automatic mode play for you!

Pump it up and chill ;)

****************
Incredibox, the brainchild of Lyon, France-based studio So Far So Good, was created in 2009. Starting out as a webpage, it was then released as a mobile and tablet app and became an instant hit. It has won several awards and appeared in various international media, including: BBC, Adobe, FWA, Gizmodo, Slate, Konbini, Softonic, Kotaku, Cosmopolitan, PocketGamer, AppAdvice, AppSpy, Vice, Ultralinx and many others. The online demo has attracted more than 100 million visitors since its creation.

us.description:
Game Introduction
Mobile Empire is a simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones", with a high degree of freedom. You will play as an entrepreneur back in 2001. You acquired the initial capital from a mystery investor because of your unique vision and created a technological enterprise that may change the world. The game starts from 2001 and ends in 2035, during which you will start with old school smartphones in the early R&D stages, progressing until AR smart glasses can be independently used. During the 35 years, you will experience, witness, and promote the magnificent development process of smartphones. You have the chance to develop your company into the world's number one technological enterprise.

• Unique theme
Currently, Mobile Empire is probably the only PC simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones". You will have the chance to create miracles and develop your little-known company into a global technological empire. 

• Innovative competition experience
In order to simulate a real business environment, lots of competitors will be constantly updated. Players may cooperate with them for joint development or poach talents from them. 

• Massive amounts of random events
In order to create a better "sense of the world", a great deal of industrial events, world events, crisis events, lucky events, employee events, and news interviews are set in this game for you to make your own choices.

• Bountiful blueprints
The game includes 65 different cell phone blueprints and more than 100 cell phone appearances from 3x3 keypads to full-screen and folding screens, and even includes futuristic AR smart glasses. Bountiful blueprints are yours to explore. 

• Vast technologies
In this game, there are many technologies and accessories are available for upgrade. In addition, with adequate funds, you can even research and develop CPUs with superior performance and experience better operating systems. Customized naming is also supported.

• Creative persuasion system
In terms of talent recruitment, the game provides a very distinctive "persuasion" system. To acquire the top talents, you need to use different communication skills to persuade the recruits according to their personalities.

• Other contents for you to explore
The game also includes credit ratings, company acquisitions, employee development, outsourcing mode, intelligence system, company strategies, and more for you to explore.

• "Mobile Empire" IOS supports the archive of PC games.

us.description:
Juicy Realm is a roguelike game with fruits as enemies. It is set in a world in which the line between animals and plants is blurred. It began with the tipping of the food-chain, which forced the humans to establish an outpost and begin an investigation in the region where the first species of mutated plants was discovered. The military has prepared a vast number of powerful weapons, with you leading the vanguard forces to wage this long war.

Subverted Order
“Many years later, when the humans watch as the plants climb up to the top of the food chain, they will be reminded of their own naivety and arrogance…”
Only when all the plants started to evolve into animals, growing limbs and becoming sentient, did the humans realize the threat of those photosynthetic-lifeforms. No one knows how they achieved the state of evolution that took animal lifeforms millions of years to reach in such a short amount of time, and no one knows their ultimate objective. The only thing known for sure is that the humans now face the greatest challenge since they climbed up to the top of the food chain.

Gameplay
As the first explorers of this unknown region, you must strive to venture deep into the enemy hive, defeat all kinds of fruits and arm yourself with various equipment, as well as upgrade yourself with the resources you find in your way.

Game Features
-Rougelite elements such as random terrains, loot drops, and monsters
-Hundreds of special and bizarre weapons and items
-Loads of unique mod enemies and bosses
-10 characters in the roster with unique skills and abilities
-Unique artstyle with rich details

Twitter: /@JuicyRealm
Facebook: @JuicyRealm
Press contact: juicyrealm@spacecangames.com

Please make sure you are using devices matching the following requirements. If you are using old devices, the game might not run normally on your device.

iPhone 6S and higher
iPad Air 2 and higher
iPad Mini 4 and higher

us.description:
A story-driven experience about two doctors traversing backwards through a dying man's memories to artificially fulfill his last wish.

ABOUT THIS GAME
Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads.

Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t.

This particular story follows their attempt to fulfill the dream of an elderly man, Johnny. With each step back in time, a new fragment of Johnny's past is revealed. As the two doctors piece together the puzzled events that spanned a life time, they seek to find out just why the frail old man chose his dying wish to be what it is.

And Johnny's last wish is, of course... to go to the moon.

MORE DETAILS
"To the Moon", a story-driven RPG with pixel graphics, was originally developed six years ago for PC by Canadian producer Kan Gao and Freebird Games, his indie game studio.Rights to develop and publish the remastered mobile version of "To the Moon" were acquired by X.D. Network Inc.
The story of "To the Moon" unfolds before players, much like a movie. While the entire game has no battle system and can be completed in a few hours, the compelling story and moving original soundtrack resonated with players worldwide. On top of receiving overwhelmingly positive ratings, "To the Moon" received multiple awards from Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, and more, and was nominated for "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" in the 2016 Steam Awards.

KEY FEATURES
•	Unlocked 29 new iMessage stickers.
•	Added "Music Box" function, allowing backstage music playing& in-game music downloading(will be enabled automatically after clearing the stage).
•	Added "DIY QR code" function, allowing one-key sharing of player data for playing on different devices.
•	A unique & non-combat story-driven experience
•	Innovative mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics
•	Acclaimed original soundtrack that closely ties to the story
•	An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains

us.description:
ICEY is a 2D side-scrolling action game. As you follow the narrator's omnipresent voice, you will see through ICEY's eyes and learn the truth about her world. 

“Alright, you caught me! This ISN'T really just a simple 2D action game, and you WON'T be seeing through ICEY's eyes... NOR will you learn the truth about her world." says the narrator. 

“ICEY is a Meta game in disguise. The narrator will constantly urge you in one direction, but you must ask, "Why? Why am I following his directions? Why can't I learn the truth about this world and ICEY's purpose here?" Fight against his tyranny, and uncover what's really going on for yourself!

In fact, you can become ICEY, and let loose the shackles of your own identity. You are ICEY, and ICEY is you... if you want it that way. Feel free to keep hold of your own self, if you wish. 

Now Is the Time For You to Discover the Truth.

[FEATURES]

Fast-paced Combat: 
Crush enemies in the palm of your hand. 
Attack! Dodge! Counterattack! Do not hesitate. 
This is the only way to survive! 

Incredible Combos: 
With simple controls, amazing combos are easy to unleash, even for beginners. 
Every skill is special in its own way. Master your favorites and create your own fighting style!

Massive Cyborg Bosses: 
Can you withstand the onslaught of attacks from terrifying cyborg bosses? 
Every boss unleashes flurries of different attacks. It's up to you to find their weak spots and tear them apart!

[Awards]
-Nominated, Tokyo Game Show 2016 DENGEKI PlayStation Best Indie Game

us.description:
Cyber Manhunt is a Cyber-Style, Realistic- Society theme, Story-Rich indie game. The game taked place in the Republic of Alivia with some different theme stories ,but the fate of the characters is closely related in there. It will focus on social issues liking big data, hacking, citizen privacy etc... 

We want to reveal the profound themes behind the stories with wonderful plots and gamification. And let players pay more attention to Cyber Violence and Privacy Breaches.

[Contents]
◆Chapter I: Death of a Programmer
The CEO of a company committed suicide by jumping off a building, and claimed that he was extorted tens of millions by his wife. While his wife posted photos of domestic violence on social networks. Who is lying?
◆Chapter II: Invisible Eyes
The indecent video of the female college student went viral on the Internet. At this moment, she was already socially dead. Who is the initiator? Who should protect the safety of women?
◆Chapter III: The Evidence Vanishes
The student council president, who is both excellent in character and study, suddenly disappeared. The bullying incident made the case more complicated. Who is the murderer and who is the victim?
◆Chapter IV: The Price of Humiliation
The female singer has been exposed again! Threatening letters, hype, the suicide of former girl group members... The Internet has set off a public opinion carnival again!
◆Chapter V: Immortal Code
When the society is in madness, are you willing to join the Immortal Code to obtain true love and immortality?
◆DLC: Home Sweet Home
Behind this seemingly sweet and happy family, everyone has their own secrets, what is the truth hidden behind?!
◆DLC: Hello World!
Senior researcher of Titan Dr. Lucrezia died in a terrible car accident on the spot, but the fellow Benjamin took escape from death. But he did not realize that he was about to be involved in a huge conspiracy…

[Features]
◆Highly Immersive: Gamers play as a hacker in the game, accepts the commission of the company, and solve dangerous incidents.
◆Rich Gameplay: There are lots of features of Social Engineering in the game, which is including Detecting, Tracking, Puzzles-Solving, Destroying and Hacking etc..
◆Wonderful Plots: Each chapter in the game will reflect a current hot social topic, such as: Sneak Shot, Cyber Violence, School Bullying, etc...
◆Multiple Roles: There are many different roles in this game with a flash of personality. Their stories would be dug by yourself.
◆Fully Dubbing: All the characters in the game have their own voice actors that make the game experience more immersive.
◆Original Music: There are some original songs in the game, and the lyrics and vocals are all completed by the studio.

[Gameplay]
◆Web Search: You should collect basic information about the targets through the Internet search.
◆Database: You can use the database to get deep information about targets.
◆Crack: You would get passwords based on the obtained target's information, and use it to log in to accounts of different platforms.
◆Chat: The exciting thing is that you need to chat with targets by disguise and use the information to get the trust of the target.
◆Phishing: You can send phishing links to hack the targets' hardware devices, and get private information.
◆Picture Analysis: You can get valuable information and relevant clues from pictures.
More advanced hacking methods will be unlocked later!

Rare drops! Class changes! And an epic story.
The 4th installment of the hardcore Hack & Slash RPG "Knight & Dragon," packed with replay value!

"Knight & Dragon 4" is the fourth title in this Hack & Slash RPG series built within a medieval fantasy world.

The story takes place about 30 years prior to the events of the previous game, III. The setting is the "Hundred Years' War" between the great Lindar Empire and the Kingdom of Langheim, one of the Eldorua kingdoms. The journey begins in a refugee camp located near the border of these two great powers.
In a world swirling with conspiracy, people from all walks of life are swept up in the chaos of war. The stories of their respective knights and dragons eventually converge toward a single conclusion. Enjoy an epic narrative featuring characters from previous titles.

[Features of Knight & Dragon 4]

* Heated Real-Time Battles: The core systems of a "replayable RPG," such as rare item drops and class changes, follow the beloved formula of previous titles!
* Expanded Party Size: You can now battle with a party of 6 members. Time pauses while selecting commands, allowing for more intuitive control!
* Deep Strategic Gameplay: With new systems like "Formations" and "Skill Chaining," the battle system is more refined, offering even more depth and replayability!
* New Jobs Added: With the addition of the "Beast Tamer" and "Gladiator," there are now 8 jobs in total. New skills have also been added to complement existing jobs!
* Revamped World: A completely renewed world map to color the epic story. Of course, post-game content is included!
* Legacy Content: Many characters from the previous game appear, with significant text additions that supplement the scenarios of the past titles!
* Classic Features: Popular basic functions from the previous game, such as Party Dispatch, Persona functions, and Equipment Enhancement/Customization, are all here!

...

If you would like to experience the atmosphere of the game before purchasing, the previous title "Knight & Dragon" is available completely free of charge, so please give it a try.

Official Website
http://dgjam.com/knightdragon4

us.trackName: PhyschinggLab - 你的物理溫習神器
us.description:
你是否曾經在物理考試前的最後一分鐘，臨急抱佛腳，卻發現筆記找不到、公式記不起來？別擔心！「Physchingg Lab」 就是你的救星，讓你隨時隨地玩遊戲、記物理知識，考試溫書再也不頭痛！

Phy識大亂鬥：玩卡牌配對遊戲及物理問答的同時，偷偷記住那些令人頭痛的定義和公式！
互動物理模擬實驗：體驗逼真的電場線、質能轉換、波動等模擬實驗，抽象概念瞬間變具體！
錯題本神器：解決「錯了又錯」的煩惱！自動整理你的錯題，還能一鍵匯出 PDF，讓你隨身帶著溫習。
實驗室探索模式：在虛擬實驗室中自由探索，調整參數觀察現象變化，培養科學思維！
自製卡片溫習庫：溫書也要個性化！製作屬於自己的溫習卡片，雞精式記住最重要的內容。
討論留言專區：與同學互相切磋，出題、許願、分享學習心得！
1分鐘速記中英定義和公式：考試前快速掃一眼，讓知識像雞精一樣瞬間濃縮進腦袋！

不管是 DSE 學生還是任何需要短期記憶加速的人，這款 app 都能助你一臂之力！
快來下載「Physchingg Lab」，讓物理學習變得更有趣、更高效！唔好臨急抱佛腳，不如抱我！

us.description:
One of the best hack-and-slash games of all time now fits in your pocket!

Originally released on PC in 2006, Titan Quest is an action RPG set against a mythological backdrop. The Titans have escaped from prison and are hell-bent on destroying the Earth. The Gods alone can’t stop them -- a hero is needed to lead this epic struggle. Victory or defeat will determine humanity’s fate and that of the Olympians.

You are that hero! Create your character, explore ancient civilizations like Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China, and fight against hordes of legendary creatures! Master the arts of archery, swordsmanship or magic and upgrade your character to unlock awesome powers! Discover special items to help you complete your quest: legendary swords, devastating thunderbolts, enchanted bows, and much more!

Specially adapted for mobile devices, this new version offers numerous new features:

● A new touch-friendly interface 
● Completely redesigned touch-friendly gameplay 
● High-quality graphics
● A huge, open world to explore
● Full day/night cycle
● 80 different mythological creatures: Minotaurs, Cyclopses, Gorgons, and many more
● 1200+ items to discover
● 30 different character classes 
● 150 different character skills
● Colossal playtime of more than 60 hours 
● Scalable difficulty modes:  weapons and enemies match your skill level 
● Dozens of unlockable achievements to discover
● No ads, no microtransactions. 

Mixing ancient mythology with non-stop action, Titan Quest is a classic hack-and-slash offering energizing gameplay with a fast, intense rhythm. Overcome thrilling challenges and vanquish the greatest enemies ever to invade the mobile world!

DLCs available as in-app purchase: 
● IMMORTAL THRONE - Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx to conquer this dark new adventure.
● RAGNARÖK - In the uncharted lands of northern Europe, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods!
● ATLANTIS - Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. Including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles!
● ETERNAL EMBERS - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain.

About:
Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move.

Features:
● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban
● 150 handcrafted rooms
● Fantasy themed pixel art
● Non-linear dungeon map

--

Interpret the law as you see fit in This Is the Police 2, sequel to the acclaimed noir drama This Is the Police! Run the sheriff’s department, manage your cops, investigate, interrogate, and incarcerate. Make tough decisions – and try to keep out of prison yourself! – in this story-driven mixture of adventure, strategy, and turn-based tactical combat.

Is it a simulation? A management game? A tactical challenge? A visual novel? A puzzle? It’s all of these, and more!

Dive into one-of-a-kind -story-driven experience.
Welcome to Sharpwood, a cold and harsh border town riven with violence, where no one is completely innocent. Smugglers, gangs, and screaming populists call this town their home. To maintain peace and order, the young sheriff Lilly Reed (Sarah Hamilton) will have to team up with fugitive criminal Jack Boyd (Jon St. John), and pray that her dangerous plan doesn’t spiral out of control.

Take charge of the Sheriff’s department.
Your subordinates aren’t just some resource; they are living people with their own strengths, weaknesses, fears, and prejudices – and you'll have to reckon with all of them in order to survive. Is one of your guys drinking too much? Or always coming up with excuses for not coming to work? Or does he refuse to follow orders? You’ll have to show a steady hand if you want to impose discipline on this department.

Engage in tactical combat.
During your most dangerous operations, the game will switch to turn-based combat. Gather a team of your finest cops. Carefully study the terrain, adapt your plans, stealthily approach your suspects and use non-lethal weapons and equipment – if the situation allows. True, sometimes gunfights are almost impossible to avoid, but be careful: This Is the Police 2 doesn’t have hit points. A single bullet can cost a cop their life.

Become a true detective.
Collect evidence, study case materials, interrogate suspects and send the criminals to court. And if the suspect was innocent? Perhaps it's time to find out if any Sharpwood judges can be bought.

Thank you for playing ‘THIS IS THE POLICE 2’!

us.description:
In this eagerly anticipated sequel of the game “Clouds & Sheep”, the cute sheep are finally on the loose again! Solve countless quests and fulfill your wooly friends’ needs. Plant grass, flowers, trees and shear your animals’ different-colored wool to stock up your resources! Collect happy stars, harvest wood and flower petals and use them to provide your flock with food, accessories, toys and more! Control the clouds and make it rain to ensure your sheep never run out of fresh water to drink. If your sheep feel happy and content, they’ll bring tiny lambs into the world!

Every single animal is asking for your attention! The fluffy balls of wool love to be entertained. Make your sheep jump and use different toys like the trampoline, the seesaw and the swing to actively play with them! Watch your pets interact with each other and observe their reactions to the objects you give to them! Customize your flock’s pasture with fun objects and choose between different settings like the Wild West or Pirate scenery. Watch your flock run around by day and sleep by the cozy campfire at night. Do everything you can to keep your sheep happy and healthy to prevent them from becoming big, cottony clouds in the sky.

Features:
- PLAY WITHOUT ADS!
- Awesome sequel of the top game “Clouds & Sheep”
- Go on an epic adventure to find the legendary Fountain of Youth!
- Simulation game with adorable sheep
- Take care of your flock
- Raise sweet little lambs
- Actively play with your animals
- Give them many different items and objects
- Grow and harvest various resources
- Shear your sheep
- Customize their pasture
- Control the weather
- Day-night cycle
- Open-ended game set in a 3D world
- Suitable for kids, but also fun for the whole family
- MFi game controller support
- Game Center support

Thank you for playing ‘Clouds & Sheep 2’!

us.description:
Moncage is a stunning vignette puzzle adventure developed by Optillusion. 

The game takes place inside a mysterious cube, with each side of the cube housing a unique world: be it an old factory, a light tower, an amusement park, or a church, etc. At first sight, they may seem random and unrelated, but upon closer look, you will become mesmerized by the subtle and intricate ways of how these worlds connect…  

【Solve Puzzles with Mind-Boggling Optical Illusions】
Use your imagination and spare no brain cells to find the connection and pinpoint every possible interaction between different sides of the cube, then watch as the magic unfold in front of you.

【Collect All Photos to Unveil the Story】
Behind the puzzles, there lies a story with a surprising twist for the player to uncover. Collect the photos from obscure corners and angles to reveal the underlying story, one photo at a time.

【Get Unstuck with Thoughtful Hints】
There is a multitude of guidance systems to help prevent players from getting stuck. Focus can be activated to highlight the key items to the solution, while hint texts are available to provide further clarity. And, if all else fails, video walkthroughs can be unlocked as the ultimate safety plan. 

【Prove Your Puzzle-Solving Skills with Medals】
There are a total of 15 achievements in the game, each corresponding with a Medal that has been crafted with a uniquely stunning design. A complete collection of the 15 Medals could be the perfect evidence to attest to your master puzzle-solving skills~

【Connect with us:】
Twitter: @MoncageTheGame
Email: moncagethegame@gmail.com
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/TEVX2uPEsj

us.description:
Digline is a relaxed and easy to learn drilling game where every descent is a gamble between progress and risk, and the real reward lies deeper underground.

Start each run in your workshop, pick your setup, and head down with limited fuel and a scrappy rig. Carve your path through shifting layers of earth, decide what to collect, and choose what to upgrade and what to trade before everything runs out.

Each dive reveals new materials, rarer finds, and unexpected patterns beneath the surface. What begins as simple digging gradually turns into a careful balance between exploration, efficiency, and timing.

Back at the surface, refine your strategy and improve your runs:

• Upgrade your drill, fuel capacity, and efficiency
• Unlock new materials with higher value and deeper placement
• Optimize routes to maximize each descent

Progress builds steadily, but every run carries tension. Go too safe and you leave value behind. Push too far and risk losing it all.

Shape your own rhythm underground: short and efficient runs, deep high-risk dives, or a steady climb toward mastering what lies below.

Top 10 casual game in the US and UK, Top 5 in Germany, Norway, and others. Come join the fun!

What starts as a simple search for resources gradually becomes something stranger. Your old tunnels remain, your map expands over time, and the underground begins to feel less random and more like a place with its own history.

Digline is designed to be easy to pick up, fun in short sessions, and rewarding over the long term. Quick digs, short descents, tons of relaxing fun.

Features:

• intuitive one-finger portrait controls
• short runs that fit easily into a minute or two
• persistent tunnels and a map that grows with each expedition
• multiple underground regions with different materials, hazards, and surprises
• resources to gather and use for crafting upgrades, and better preparation
• a workshop that turns each successful run into permanent progress
• a market system for trading what you bring back
• progression that builds across many sessions, not just a single run
• a calm, cozy atmosphere with a sense of discovery underneath it
• no ads, and no pay-to-win systems
• by popular request, you can now purchase fuel if you want to keep on digging, but the game can be completed without any purchase
• achievements and Daily Dig leaderboard competition

The deeper you go, the more the mine will reveal.

us.description:
What lies beyond the bath curtain? A "hot" new entry into the hotel sim genre!

Features new baths exclusive to the sequel. Furnish your resort with Cauldron Baths, Footbaths, Open-Air Baths, and more. Create and customize your own world-famous hot springs resort.

Entertain visitors with tons of facilities, including Ping Pong Tables, Stores, and Oil Drum Baths. Don't forget to provide first-class local cuisine! Thrill foodie guests with everything from humble Ramen Stalls to fancy Sushi Restaurants.

Give your grounds a splash of color with decorative plants and watch the seasons change throughout the year.

Baths also have a variety of effects, like relieving fatigue or promoting smooth, glowing skin. Placing a Beautician and Chocolatier near one of these baths will help you reel in guests who want to feel pampered.

Help develop the local area by investing in different tourist attractions. Will you promote the Soothing Forest? A bustling Amusement Park? Maybe even an all-year round Ski Slope?

Before you know it, you'll be booking tours for all kinds of visitors, from couples and families to ninjas and supermodels! The more guests you welcome, the more popular your resort will become.

Hit the right targets, and travel guides will start featuring you in their rankings, too. Aim for the top and become the best 5-Star hot springs resort the world has ever seen!

us.description:
戏曲锣鼓是一款专为戏曲爱好者打造的虚拟打击乐器应用，让你在手机或平板上，随时随地体验传统戏曲锣鼓演奏的魅力。应用内收录多种经典戏曲打击乐器，并支持高度自定义配置，满足不同戏曲流派、演奏风格与个人创作需求。本应用主要有以下特点：

- 简单易用，初学者友好：界面简洁直观，无论是戏曲初学者还是专业爱好者，都能快速上手。通过触屏即可轻松演奏，随时体验传统锣鼓节奏。

- 丰富的戏曲锣鼓乐器：内置多种经典戏曲打击乐器，如大鼓、大堂鼓、小堂鼓、大锣、小锣、风锣、铙钹、小钹、广钹、板鼓、板、梆子、碰铃、木鱼、引磬、铛子、大磬、钟、手鼓，并提供不同力度音色，还原真实演奏体验。

- 高性能无延迟演奏：敲击即响，声音响应迅速；支持快速连续击打、多点触控与多音同时打击，演奏流畅不卡顿、不串音。

- 强大的键盘自定义系统：支持自由调整键盘布局、行列数量、按键大小与间距，支持拖拽交换按键位置，支持背景外观配置，打造更符合个人习惯的戏曲锣鼓演奏界面。

- 灵活的按钮配置：支持按钮颜色自定义、按键图片显示、按键名称修改等功能，每个按键最多可绑定 3 个乐器音色，实现个性化锣鼓经与专属打击垫配置。

- 录音与回放功能：支持实时录制戏曲锣鼓演奏过程，一键保存精彩演奏内容，并可随时回放练习成果，方便记录灵感、复盘节奏与分享作品。

立即下载，开启属于你的戏曲锣鼓演奏之旅！如遇到错误或提供意见与建议，请联系邮箱：yuliuapp@icloud.com

us.description:

- exclusive rain notification
- no Ads

Expect the Unexpected with this Beautiful and Easy-to-use Weather App

Accurate Minute to Minute Rainfall Forecast - When will the rain start and when is it going to stop? Know about the weather in advance and plan your day out properly!


Street-level accuracy: No more imprecise forecasts based on a national or city level! Your exclusive weather forecast for every block in the neighborhood is here!

Multiple Location Selections: Street-level accurate forecasts to keep an eye on your loved ones!


China Rainfall Map - We use the National Meteorological Radar to produce our accurate forecast. Just take a glimpse to know exactly where and how heavy the rain will be!


China Air Pollution Map - Is the pollution growing stronger or fading away? Where is it heading to? Just take a look at this map and get the answer to all of your questions!

Real-time satellite imagery
From the astronaut's point of view, tracing the flowing cloud and glittering days, and Help yourself judge the weather

Omni-directional weather map
Look at the evolution trend of precipitation, temperature, dew point temperature, humidity and visibility in the next two days.

Weather Feedback - If you feel that our forecast is not completely accurate, please tap the feedback button to help us improve!


------
A big thank you to the "Swarma Club" and our partners for their long-term and unfailing support!

us.description:
Finally, Heart Machine's award winning slash-'em-up arrives to iOS in the most polished and refined version yet, the Special Edition.


► Winner of the Audience Award and Excellence in Visual Art awards of the prestigious Independent Games Festival.

► 14 + nominations among the Best Visual Design, Best Audio and Best original Game categories.

► 9/10 Destructoid - A hallmark of excellence. There may be flaws, but they are negligible and won't cause massive damage.

► 9.5/10 Game Informer - The combination of soundtrack, art, and combat creates a rabbit hole worth your full exploration.

► Eurogamer Recommended - Heart Machine's slash-'em-up is punishing and precise - and incredibly beautiful.

► 9/10 GameSpot - It is more than simply pretty; Hyper Light Drifter uses its visuals to both guide and relax you. The grandest vistas calm your pulse between difficult, breathless combat sequences.

► 8.5 Polygon - Hyper Light Drifter deftly mixes contemplative moments with breakneck action.

► 5 Stars Darkstation - The top-down action-RPG Hyper Light Drifter is an amazing game: gorgeous, a fascinating world to explore, tight controls, beautiful music, and the faith in the player for you to figure things out on your own.


Echoes of a dark and violent past resonate throughout a savage land, steeped in treasure and blood. Drifters of this world are the collectors of forgotten knowledge, lost technologies and broken histories. Our Drifter is haunted by an insatiable illness, traveling further into the lands of Buried Time, hoping to discover a way to quiet the vicious disease.

Hyper Light Drifter is an action adventure RPG in the vein of the best 16-bit classics, with modernized mechanics and designs on a much grander scale. Explore a beautiful, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers and lost technologies.


Features:

● 120 fps gameplay on iPad Pro / 60 fps on iPhone and iPad.
● Compatible with MFi controllers.
● Game Center achievements.
● Haptic Vibration.
● From each character to subtle background elements, everything is lovingly hand-animated.
● Easy to pick up, difficult to master; enemies are vicious and numerous, hazards will easily crush your frail body, and friendly faces remain rare.
● Upgrade weapons, learn new skills, discover equipment and traverse a dark, detailed world with branching paths and secrets abound.
● Evocative soundtrack composed by Disasterpeace.
● All the content from the original game + more weapons, enemies and areas from the Special edition.

tr.description:
Say goodbye to messy pen and paper! ScoreMaster is an all-in-one app designed specifically for board game and card game players. We handle the tedious calculations and physical accessories so you can focus 100% on the fun of the game.

Perfectly Supports All Your Favorite Games:
* Classic Board Games: Catan, Carcassonne, Rummikub
* Card Games & Poker: Poker, Magic: The Gathering (MTG), Pokémon TCG, Yu-Gi-Oh!
* Party & Social Deduction: Werewolf, Avalon, Codenames
* RPGs: Dungeons & Dragons (D&D) and any custom scoring games
Six Core Features:
* Intuitive Scoring: Supports multiple players. Add or subtract points with a single tap on a clean, distraction-free interface.
* Match History: Automatically saves final scores and historical match records for every game you play.
* First Player Selector: Multiple players touch the screen to randomly pick the starting player in just one second.
* Random Dice Roller: Built-in virtual dice. Roll instantly with a tap—never worry about forgetting physical dice again.
* Countdown Timer: Customizable sand timer, essential for time-limited party games and trivia.
* Versus Timer (Chess Clock): Dedicated 2-player turn timer. Say goodbye to slow play and keep competitive matches fair.
Download ScoreMaster today and make your next game night smoother and more professional!

With BikeControl (formerly SwiftControl) you can control your favorite trainer app using your hardware click devices. Here's what you can do with it, depending on your configuration:

▶ Virtual Gear shifting
▶ Steering / turning
▶ Adjust workout intensity
▶ Control music on your device
▶ More? If you can do it via keyboard, mouse or touch, you can do it with BikeControl


Privacy and Security:
▶ BikeControl only accesses your screen to perform the gestures you configure
▶ No other accessibility features or personal information is accessed
▶ All gesture configurations remain on your device
▶ The app does not connect to external services for accessibility functions

tr.description:
Save time and make your day more efficient with this simple and clean widget calendar.
Check and manage your dates and events right from your iPhone home screen.

◦ Home Screen Widgets: Three widget sizes (small, medium, large) are supported. Place calendar widgets and event list widgets where you want to see your schedule at a glance.

◦ Interactive Widgets: Tap any date in the widget to instantly see events for that day, and use the month/week/day navigation buttons to browse other dates. You can also complete reminders directly from the widget to manage your schedule without opening the app.

◦ Versatile Event Display: Show events on the calendar as color bars, dots, numbers, and more. Automatically optimized for your widget size.

◦ Clean Calendar View: Enjoy a simple and clean monthly/weekly calendar. Displays events from all calendars synced to iCloud, including the iPhone Calendar, Google Calendar, Exchange, and more.

◦ Reminders Integration: View your iOS Reminders alongside your events on the calendar, and complete them directly from the widget. Manage events and tasks in one place.

◦ Lunar Calendar: Supports both Korean and Chinese lunar calendars. View lunar dates on your calendar so you never miss a holiday or a lunar birthday.

◦ Anniversary Management: Save and manage important dates like birthdays and wedding anniversaries. Supports both solar and lunar anniversaries, with notifications at the time of your choice.

◦ D-Day: Track days remaining until important dates with D-Day. Past dates appear as D+, so you can grasp anniversaries at a glance.

◦ Add Events: Add events you want to save to your calendar with just one tap from the widget.

◦ Event Search: Find what you're looking for fast with one-tap search. You can also narrow your search by date range.

◦ iCloud Backup: Anniversary data is automatically backed up and synced via iCloud. Your data stays safe even when you switch devices.

◦ Dark Mode: Optimized colors for both light and dark mode for a comfortable experience anytime.

If you have any questions or run into issues, please email us at 'dayseed.help@gmail.com'. :D

◦ This app supports Korean, English, Chinese, and Japanese.

If you love music and want to master your bass guitar in perfection like Richard Bona, Stanley Clarke, John Patitucci, Billy Sheehan, Victor Wooten, Gary Willis, or even better, then you just need to have this app!!!

Demo video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2LPNsS2F6bs

This app is a great collection of bass guitar modes, that gives you an excellent original material for improvisations and solo on the bass! Bass Modes Symmetry School is a triple horizontal system, in which modes are played with three notes on each string. Today many progressive bass guitarists use the wide extended fingering instead of usual traditional. This school presents "horizontal-extended" fingering, that helps you to perform modes in 1-2 octaves bound. The material in this school is also irreplaceable if you want to master a shredding bass technique. The app will be useful as for beginners, so for professionals!

●●●●● Bass Modes Symmetry School features: 
--------------------------------------
- 3-notes-per-string approach works perfectly for bass
- Easy learning of modes
- Ability to achieve fast performance speed (●SHREDDING●)
- Theoretical and practical usage for guitar, bass and piano players
- Given material works best with jazz but also can be used for latin, pop, funk, rock, etc. 
- This school will work for a beginner as well as for intermediate and advanced players. 

●●●●● App Features: 
------------------ 
● 322 + 23 (new) types of different bass modes, which can be easily transposed, resulting in about 3,800 of total modes!
● Harmony feature: you can see and listen to the chords, over which given modes can be played. More information about these chords you can find in our "International Guitar Chords 1 & 2" apps 
● Every mode is provided with corresponding optimal fingerings for your comfort 
● Transpose modes to any desired key by dragging notes on the screen with your finger
● Metrotone with adjustable tempo and time signature can be used as a trainer
● 5 different Metrotone click sounds at your choice
● Cursor can display note names or fingering (selectable) 
● Notes can display note names or fingering (selectable)
● Sharp and flat signatures correspond to the current mode's key  
● Fast cycled playback of modes with adjustable tempo
● Slow step-by-step playback of modes for easier learning 
● Six selectable harmony timbres to choose from 
● Stereo Chorus FX for harmony chords at your choice
● Reverb effect, applied to bass guitar and harmony (adjustable)
● designed both for iPhone and iPad

● iOS 10 and up compatible

tr.description:
This is a fantastical tale of an exotic land. The Old Empire has fallen, leaving rival tribes to fight for control of the great desert. Little do they know of the seeds of darkness which grow in the shadows with each passing day...

Sands of Salzaar is an open-world strategy-action RPG set across a sprawling desert. Build up and manage your forces from a single unit to a mighty army, then lead them into massive battles against your foes. How you progress is up to you: customize your hero with a wide variety of skills and talents, choose which factions to side with, and plan your strategies carefully to establish yourself as whoever you aspire to be - a lone wolf, a wealthy trader, a city lord, or a war schemer.

tr.description:
“Money Manager” is an optimized application for personal account management. 

Household account management is complicated. But we make it simple by simplifying the things that are complex. The default settings will get you started, and once you get used to it, you can alter the settings according to your needs with the highly flexible and customizable functions available. 

- Super easy and simple to enter data anytime, anywhere. 
- View your spending tendencies graphically. 
- View statistics by simply entering the data. 
- Search and calculator functions. 
- Set up sub-categories and main categories as necessary. 
- Manage all your accounts at once. 
- Use multiple currencies. 
- Check weekly, monthly, and annual statistics. 
- Use the calendar view. 
- Use budget planning features to plan weekly, monthly, and annual budgets. 
- Change the start date of the month. 

※ Applying double entry bookkeeping 
It facilitates efficient account management. Automatically double entry bookkeeping. 

※ PC manager function 
You can view ‘“Money Manager” application using Wi-Fi or 3G. You can edit and sort the data by date, category or account group on the screen of your PC. In addition, you can see fluctuations of your accounts indicated on graphs on your PC. 

※ Budget management function 
You can manage your budget. It shows your budget and expenditures on a graph so you can compare the amount of your expenditures against your budget quickly. 

※ Credit Card / Debit Card management function 
When entering a future payment date, you can see the payment amount and outstanding balance on the accounts page. You can connect your debit card to your accounts so that expenses are automatically recorded under a specific account. 

※ Passcode 
You can specify the desired time lapse before the app requests a passcode. 

※ Automatic money transfer and frequency functions 
You can set up automatic money transfers between your accounts and configure the frequency of those transfers. 

※ Sort expenses by the recipient 
You can sort your expenses by the recipient and view this information graphically. 

※ Payment Profiles 
You can easily enter frequent expenditures by creating payment profiles. 

※ Backup / Restore 
You can backup and restore your data via email, iTunes and iCloud. 

※ Multiple currency support – you can have individual entries in multiple currencies, and configure each account to calculate the total balance in your desired currency.

Subscription pricing and terms:

Money Manager offers auto-renewing monthly subscription at US$2.49/month and an auto-renewing yearly subscription at US$19.99/year to provide you with unlimited access to the Money Manager Data Sync Service while you maintain an active subscription.

Payment will be charged to the credit card connected to your iTunes Account when you confirm the initial subscription purchase.
Subscriptions automatically renew unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current subscription period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and the cost of the renewal will be identified. 
You may manage your subscription and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to your Account Settings after the purchase.

https://realbyteapps.com/policy/terms.html

https://realbyteapps.com/policy/privacy.html

tr.description:
Incredibox lets you create your own music with the help of a merry crew of beatboxers. Choose your musical style to start laying down, recording and sharing your mix. Get your groove on with hip-hop beats, electro waves, pop voices, jazzy swing, Brazilian rhythms and much more. As well, discover a selection of mods created by the community. Plenty to keep you mixing for hours, with no ads or microtransactions.

Part game, part tool, Incredibox is above all an audio and visual experience that has quickly become a hit with people of all ages. The right mix of music, graphics, animation and interactivity makes Incredibox ideal for everyone. And because it makes learning fun and entertaining, Incredibox is now being used by schools all over the world.

How to play? Easy! Drag and drop icons onto the avatars to make them sing and start to compose your own music. Find the right sound combos to unlock animated choruses that will enhance your tune.

Once your composition sounds great, just save it and share it to get as many votes as possible. If you get enough votes, you may go down in Incredibox history by joining the Top 50 chart! Ready to show your stuff?

You can also download your mix as an MP3 from the app and listen to it over and over again!

Too lazy to create your own mix? No problem, just let the automatic mode play for you!

Pump it up and chill ;)

****************
Incredibox, the brainchild of Lyon, France-based studio So Far So Good, was created in 2009. Starting out as a webpage, it was then released as a mobile and tablet app and became an instant hit. It has won several awards and appeared in various international media, including: BBC, Adobe, FWA, Gizmodo, Slate, Konbini, Softonic, Kotaku, Cosmopolitan, PocketGamer, AppAdvice, AppSpy, Vice, Ultralinx and many others. The online demo has attracted more than 100 million visitors since its creation.

tr.description:
Game Introduction
Mobile Empire is a simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones", with a high degree of freedom. You will play as an entrepreneur back in 2001. You acquired the initial capital from a mystery investor because of your unique vision and created a technological enterprise that may change the world. The game starts from 2001 and ends in 2035, during which you will start with old school smartphones in the early R&D stages, progressing until AR smart glasses can be independently used. During the 35 years, you will experience, witness, and promote the magnificent development process of smartphones. You have the chance to develop your company into the world's number one technological enterprise.

• Unique theme
Currently, Mobile Empire is probably the only PC simulation game based on "manufacturing mobile phones". You will have the chance to create miracles and develop your little-known company into a global technological empire. 

• Innovative competition experience
In order to simulate a real business environment, lots of competitors will be constantly updated. Players may cooperate with them for joint development or poach talents from them. 

• Massive amounts of random events
In order to create a better "sense of the world", a great deal of industrial events, world events, crisis events, lucky events, employee events, and news interviews are set in this game for you to make your own choices.

• Bountiful blueprints
The game includes 65 different cell phone blueprints and more than 100 cell phone appearances from 3x3 keypads to full-screen and folding screens, and even includes futuristic AR smart glasses. Bountiful blueprints are yours to explore. 

• Vast technologies
In this game, there are many technologies and accessories are available for upgrade. In addition, with adequate funds, you can even research and develop CPUs with superior performance and experience better operating systems. Customized naming is also supported.

• Creative persuasion system
In terms of talent recruitment, the game provides a very distinctive "persuasion" system. To acquire the top talents, you need to use different communication skills to persuade the recruits according to their personalities.

• Other contents for you to explore
The game also includes credit ratings, company acquisitions, employee development, outsourcing mode, intelligence system, company strategies, and more for you to explore.

• "Mobile Empire" IOS supports the archive of PC games.

tr.description:
Juicy Realm is a roguelike game with fruits as enemies. It is set in a world in which the line between animals and plants is blurred. It began with the tipping of the food-chain, which forced the humans to establish an outpost and begin an investigation in the region where the first species of mutated plants was discovered. The military has prepared a vast number of powerful weapons, with you leading the vanguard forces to wage this long war.

Subverted Order
“Many years later, when the humans watch as the plants climb up to the top of the food chain, they will be reminded of their own naivety and arrogance…”
Only when all the plants started to evolve into animals, growing limbs and becoming sentient, did the humans realize the threat of those photosynthetic-lifeforms. No one knows how they achieved the state of evolution that took animal lifeforms millions of years to reach in such a short amount of time, and no one knows their ultimate objective. The only thing known for sure is that the humans now face the greatest challenge since they climbed up to the top of the food chain.

Gameplay
As the first explorers of this unknown region, you must strive to venture deep into the enemy hive, defeat all kinds of fruits and arm yourself with various equipment, as well as upgrade yourself with the resources you find in your way.

Game Features
-Rougelite elements such as random terrains, loot drops, and monsters
-Hundreds of special and bizarre weapons and items
-Loads of unique mod enemies and bosses
-10 characters in the roster with unique skills and abilities
-Unique artstyle with rich details

Twitter: /@JuicyRealm
Facebook: @JuicyRealm
Press contact: juicyrealm@spacecangames.com

iPhone 6S and higher
iPad Air 2 and higher
iPad Mini 4 and higher

tr.description:
A story-driven experience about two doctors traversing backwards through a dying man's memories to artificially fulfill his last wish.

ABOUT THIS GAME
Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads.

Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t.

This particular story follows their attempt to fulfill the dream of an elderly man, Johnny. With each step back in time, a new fragment of Johnny's past is revealed. As the two doctors piece together the puzzled events that spanned a life time, they seek to find out just why the frail old man chose his dying wish to be what it is.

And Johnny's last wish is, of course... to go to the moon.

MORE DETAILS
"To the Moon", a story-driven RPG with pixel graphics, was originally developed six years ago for PC by Canadian producer Kan Gao and Freebird Games, his indie game studio.Rights to develop and publish the remastered mobile version of "To the Moon" were acquired by X.D. Network Inc.
The story of "To the Moon" unfolds before players, much like a movie. While the entire game has no battle system and can be completed in a few hours, the compelling story and moving original soundtrack resonated with players worldwide. On top of receiving overwhelmingly positive ratings, "To the Moon" received multiple awards from Gamespot, Metacritic, WIRED, and more, and was nominated for "I'm Not Crying, There's Something In My Eye" in the 2016 Steam Awards.

KEY FEATURES
•	Unlocked 29 new iMessage stickers.
•	Added "Music Box" function, allowing backstage music playing& in-game music downloading(will be enabled automatically after clearing the stage).
•	Added "DIY QR code" function, allowing one-key sharing of player data for playing on different devices.
•	A unique & non-combat story-driven experience
•	Innovative mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics
•	Acclaimed original soundtrack that closely ties to the story
•	An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains

tr.description:
ICEY is a 2D side-scrolling action game. As you follow the narrator's omnipresent voice, you will see through ICEY's eyes and learn the truth about her world. 

“Alright, you caught me! This ISN'T really just a simple 2D action game, and you WON'T be seeing through ICEY's eyes... NOR will you learn the truth about her world." says the narrator. 

“ICEY is a Meta game in disguise. The narrator will constantly urge you in one direction, but you must ask, "Why? Why am I following his directions? Why can't I learn the truth about this world and ICEY's purpose here?" Fight against his tyranny, and uncover what's really going on for yourself!

In fact, you can become ICEY, and let loose the shackles of your own identity. You are ICEY, and ICEY is you... if you want it that way. Feel free to keep hold of your own self, if you wish. 

Now Is the Time For You to Discover the Truth.

[FEATURES]

Fast-paced Combat: 
Crush enemies in the palm of your hand. 
Attack! Dodge! Counterattack! Do not hesitate. 
This is the only way to survive! 

Incredible Combos: 
With simple controls, amazing combos are easy to unleash, even for beginners. 
Every skill is special in its own way. Master your favorites and create your own fighting style!

Massive Cyborg Bosses: 
Can you withstand the onslaught of attacks from terrifying cyborg bosses? 
Every boss unleashes flurries of different attacks. It's up to you to find their weak spots and tear them apart!

[Awards]
-Nominated, Tokyo Game Show 2016 DENGEKI PlayStation Best Indie Game
